ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "experiment_group" TEXT /* Group assignment for the experiment */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Educational background of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant gave consent */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the participant */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant is currently active in the study */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant was enrolled in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_experiment_group FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_group") REFERENCES experiment_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game or session */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant who played the game */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the game */,
  "number_of_stages" INTEGER /* Number of stages in the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or virtual location where the game was conducted */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used by the participant */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations made during the session */,
  "cognitive_load_level" TEXT /* Level of cognitive load during the session */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game session is completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stage */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the stage is part of */,
  "stage_number" INTEGER /* Stage number within the game */,
  "target_item" INTEGER /* Target item number for the stage */,
  "distractor_items" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of distractor item numbers */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to make a choice in milliseconds */,
  "stage_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the stage */,
  "stage_type" TEXT /* Type of stage (e.g., baseline, experimental) */,
  "stage_notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations made during the stage */,
  "cognitive_load_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cognitive load for the stage */,
  "is_skipped" INTEGER /* Indicates if the stage was skipped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stages_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "choices" (
  "choice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each choice */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stage the choice was made in */,
  "button_pressed" INTEGER /* Button number that the participant pressed */,
  "item_chosen" INTEGER /* Item number that the participant chose */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the choice was correct */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Participant's confidence level in their choice */,
  "reaction_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to react to the stimulus */,
  "choice_notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations related to the choice */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the choice was flagged for further review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("choice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_choices_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES stages ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "experiment_group" TEXT /* Experiment group the condition applies to */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "cognitive_load_level" TEXT /* Level of cognitive load for the condition */,
  "condition_notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations related to the condition */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the condition is the default condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)
